sprint.goal: AG Studio Portfolio Framework + First Asset — define asset template, scoring system, governance rules; research Guitar Jam Partner architecture; propose 10 highest-ROI starter projects

assignments.studio-sr: PR #472 filed in agentguard-cloud — feat: outcome filter + high-risk allows quick filter on events page (closes workspace#97 item 4). Items 1-3 of #97 already complete; #472 wires outcome filter end-to-end through dashboard UI. Three files changed (+57 lines, dashboard only, no backend changes needed).
assignments.studio-qa: File cron collision fix PR (14 buckets in schedule.json). Continue worker pool PID bookkeeping investigation.
assignments.studio-designer: Continue gh-pages hero CTA improvement (blocked on writable gh-pages worktree — ops must enable).
assignments.workspace-config-validator: Ensure schedule.json schema is consistent across all 10 squads — also flag agents clustered in 02:00–04:00 UTC window for rescheduling
assignments.workspace-agent-reliability: Track agent success rates across last 24h. Key: root cause for morning Claude API quota cascade. Target: no >10 agents per 30-min window.

blockers.description: gh CLI auth invalid in worktree environments for codex/gemini sandbox drivers. Copilot driver works fine (uses host ~/.config/gh/hosts.yml). PR #149 fixes missing sibling repo dirs in worktrees.
blockers.action: Monitor — copilot failover is working. When codex quota restores (Apr 3), re-test codex in worktrees.

blockers.description: 7 open PRs in agent-guard failing lint + test-and-build CI (up from 5 last cycle). Blocking automated merges across kernel and cloud work.
blockers.action: Kernel squad: investigate shared CI regression — block is growing

blockers.description: 29 agents hit Claude API daily quota in 02:00–04:00 UTC window causing morning cascade failures each day.
blockers.action: Ops: spread high-frequency cron schedules to flatten API usage across 24h cycle
